title: San Millán Zone 2 Protocol
description: 60-90 min at upper Z2 — lactate 1.7-1.9 mmol/L — Pogačar's base
purpose: Maximize mitochondrial function, fat oxidation, MCT1 lactate clearance
researcher: Iñigo San Millán / UAE Team Emirates

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/1. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 70% for 10:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 75:00 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 75% for 75:00. Where mitochondria multiply and aerobic capacity expands.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Easy miles = fast racing. 75% for 75:00. Trust the process.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 10 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Zone 2 endurance. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Sustainable all day.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 89% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 89% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 89% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 89% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 89% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
